items.title: ExchangeRight Fully Subscribes $62 Million Net-Leased Portfolio 69 DST, Expanding Essential Income REIT Pipeline
items.description: PASADENA, Calif., August 04, 2025--ExchangeRight has announced the full subscription of Net-Leased Portfolio 69 DST, reflecting continued demand for the company’s historically recession-resilient, diversified net-leased offerings that support ExchangeRight’s Essential Income REIT’s growing acquisition pipeline. The $62 million portfolio of net-leased real estate, backed by primarily investment-grade companies operating in necessity-based industries, provides investors with monthly distributions
